title: PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: BIRTHRIGHT OF HILLSBORO PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides information, support, and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 232 NE Lincoln Street Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Tuesday 11am-6pm, Wednesday-Friday 11am-2pm, other times available by appointment Email (503) 648-6766 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 648-6766 Jeanne Marie [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County and Portland area TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Line #57 & Max stop: Hillsboro Central/SE 3rd TC MAX Station, walk 0.3 mile northwest (2 blocks north to Lincoln Street, left 1/2 block) Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BIRTHRIGHT OF HILLSBORO
